title: Xenial Saudi Arabian Pecorino Romano Flatbread
description: A yeasty, gooey flatbread infused with Pecorino Romano and fresh herbs, perfect for a comforting snack. The steam and cheese create a nostalgic Saudi Arabian flavor that feels both exotic and familiar.
instructions: In a bowl combine flour, yeast, sugar and salt.
Add warm water and olive oil, stir until dough forms.
Knead dough on floured surface for 5 minutes until smooth.
Place dough in greased bowl, cover, let rise 30 minutes until doubled.
Preheat a skillet over medium-high heat with a lid.
Punch down dough, roll into a flat circle about 1cm thick.
Place dough in skillet, cover, steam for 2 minutes until surface starts to puff.
Remove lid, sprinkle shredded pecorino romano, cilantro, garlic, and chili flakes evenly.
Cook uncovered for 3 minutes until cheese melts and edges brown slightly.
Slide onto a plate, slice and serve warm.
